name: MCP Skills Manager
tagline: Serve your skills to every agent.
description: An MCP server that serves skills — reusable markdown documents (instructions, playbooks, references) — to agents. Every skill is exposed both as an MCP tool and a skill:// resource; the /mcp endpoint serves them all, and workspaces serve named subsets at /mcp/w/<slug>. Write and organize skills in a React web UI, or hand-edit flat markdown files on disk.
